title: payment.rs 'scanner self-heals' comment is false
description: payment.rs step 8 says 'best-effort: the scanner self-heals unmarked notes on next sync' — this is false. wallet/src/scanner.rs only inserts new notes; it has no nullifier-checking or spend-detection logic. Notes that fail mark_notes_spent after broadcast remain permanently unspent in the DB, causing the same notes to be selected again on the next send and double-spend rejected by the node.
